title: Aureline workspace-trust, restricted-mode, and permission-propagation vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the workspace-trust, restricted-mode, and permission-propagation ADR seed frozen in docs/adr/0018-workspace-trust-and-restricted-mode.md. Exports three record kinds every cross-surface consumer reads: trust_decision_record (one packet per observable grant / decline / revoke / narrowing / transition event), trust_audit_event_record (one packet per workspace_trust audit stream entry), and trust_matrix_inspection_record (diagnostic snapshot of the permission-propagation matrix for one workspace at one moment). Raw policy-bundle bytes, raw consent-capture bodies, raw evidence bodies, raw filesystem paths, raw signing-key material, and raw secret material MUST NOT cross this boundary; the record carries opaque refs, typed vocabulary, and reviewable summary fields only. Adding a new trust_state, transition_id, surface_family, authority_kind, remembered_decision_scope, reason_class, escalation_cue, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and requires a packet_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row co-signed by security_trust_review.

packet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this workspace-trust vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / admin exports. Raw filesystem paths, raw policy bytes, raw signing material, and raw consent-capture bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewable sentence describing posture, continuity, or operator guidance. Raw secret material, raw policy payloads, and raw filesystem paths MUST NOT appear.

trust_state.description: Frozen workspace-trust state vocabulary. Every workspace is in exactly one trust state at every moment. See ADR 0018 'Trust states (frozen)'.

transition_id.description: Frozen entry-flow and runtime transition vocabulary. See ADR 0018 'Entry-flow transitions (frozen)'.

identity_mode.description: Frozen identity-mode vocabulary inherited from ADR 0001. Identifies the envelope under which the trust decision was made.

actor_class.description: Frozen actor-class vocabulary. Names the authority under which the decision was issued. System-issued transitions (policy epoch roll, identity-gate unavailability, recovery-ladder application) carry a null actor_identity_ref.

reason_class.description: Frozen reason-class vocabulary. Names why the transition fired.

remembered_decision_scope.description: Frozen remembered-decision scope vocabulary. See ADR 0018 'Remembered-decision scope (frozen)'.

surface_family.description: Frozen surface-family vocabulary for the permission-propagation matrix. See ADR 0018 'Permission-propagation matrix (frozen shape)'.

authority_kind.description: Frozen authority-kind vocabulary. Names the behavior admitted for one surface under one trust state.

approval_ticket_scope.description: Frozen approval-ticket scope vocabulary. Rows citing approval_required_per_invocation MUST name the scope so downstream surfaces know what the ticket admits. Full ticket lifetime lives under ADR 0009.

escalation_cue.description: Frozen escalation-cue vocabulary. See ADR 0018 'Escalation cues (frozen)'.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event id set for the workspace_trust audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw secret material, raw policy-bundle bytes, raw filesystem paths, raw consent-capture bodies, or raw evidence bodies.

policy_epoch.description: Opaque, monotonic policy epoch identifier. Rolls forward when the active policy bundle changes.

tenant_scope_ref.description: Opaque tenant-scope reference when the decision rides a managed tenant boundary. Null for account_free_local.

active_bundle_refs.description: Opaque references to the currently active admin / managed / emergency / signed-repo bundles. Raw bundle bytes never appear here.

policy_context.description: Policy-context envelope. Mirrors the shape ADR 0005 and ADR 0008 carry on every decision-bearing frame.

reason_ref_kind.description: Closed vocabulary naming the kind of source that motivated the trust decision. Records are referenced by id only; raw bodies never cross.

source_reason_ref.description: One source-reason reference. Every policy_denied, quarantine_denied, emergency_action_force_restricted, safe_mode_workspace_restricted, extension_quarantine_restricted, or admin_pre_grant transition MUST cite at least one source-reason reference of the appropriate kind.

narrowing_bundle_ref.description: Opaque reference to the policy / quarantine / emergency bundle that narrows this row, when authority_kind is policy_denied, quarantine_denied, or approval_required_per_invocation under trusted_policy_degraded.

per_state_authority_entry.description: One row in the per-state authority block: which authority applies to the surface under one trust state.

per_state_authority.description: Exactly one per_state_authority_entry per frozen trust_state. Consumers MUST treat missing states as malformed rows.

default_escalation_cues.description: Default escalation cues the surface MAY present when narrowed on this row.

surface_matrix_row.description: One permission-propagation matrix row. Rides the same vocabulary as trust_decision_record.affected_surfaces.

actor_identity_ref.description: Opaque identity ref. Null for system-issued transitions (policy epoch roll, recovery-ladder application, identity-gate unavailable).

remembered_decision_scope.description: Declared remembered-decision scope. session_only for session grants; null for system-issued transitions that do not carry a remembered scope.

expires_at.description: Monotonic expiry timestamp. Required for grant_trust_session / trusted_time_bounded transitions; null when the decision does not expire.

source_reason_refs.description: Array of source-reason references. policy_denied / quarantine_denied / emergency_action_force_restricted / safe_mode_workspace_restricted / extension_quarantine_restricted / admin_pre_grant / signed_repo_allowance_admitted transitions MUST cite at least one reference.

affected_surfaces.description: Surface families the packet is currently narrowing, widening, or reporting on.

escalation_cues.description: Repair / review cues the surface MAY present. Cues are recommendations, not blockers to editing.

recovery_action_ref.description: Recovery-action ref for restricted_recovery_fallback and restricted_extension_quarantine transitions. Null otherwise. Defined by schemas/support/recovery_action.schema.json.

trust_decision_record.description: One observable grant / decline / revoke / narrowing / transition event. Consumed by shell chrome, admin export, support bundles, governance packets, and the audit stream.

trust_audit_event_record.description: One entry on the workspace_trust audit stream. Every audit event references its originating trust_decision_record by packet ref; it does not restate the full packet. workspace_trust_matrix_row_admitted / _denied events MUST carry surface_family and authority_kind.

surface_matrix_rows.description: One row per observed / relevant surface family. Consumers MAY snapshot a subset for focused inspection surfaces; the full registry lives in artifacts/security/trust_state_matrix.yaml.

source_reason_refs.description: References to the admin / managed / emergency / recovery bundles active at inspection time.

trust_matrix_inspection_record.description: Diagnostic snapshot of the permission-propagation matrix for one workspace at one moment. Used by support exports, admin exports, doctor probes, and governance packets to inspect the live posture without scraping surface-local flags.
